raw_output: {"findings": [{"title": "Reflected Query Parameters in Response", "description": "The /api/v1/users GET endpoint directly reflects the 'q' and 'page' query parameters in the JSON response. If consumed by a frontend that renders HTML, this enables reflected XSS.", "severity": "medium", "confidence": "firm", "file": "app.js", "line": 12, "snippet": "res.json({ query: req.query.q, page: req.query.page })", "cwe": "CWE-79", "tags": ["xss", "reflection"]}, {"title": "Hardcoded Authentication Token", "description": "The /login endpoint returns a hardcoded token regardless of credentials. This is an authentication bypass vulnerability.", "severity": "critical", "confidence": "firm", "file": "app.js", "line": 45, "snippet": "res.json({ token: 'hardcoded-token-123' })", "cwe": "CWE-798", "tags": ["authentication", "hardcoded-credentials"]}, {"title": "Credential Reflection in Login Response", "description": "The /login endpoint echoes the username and password back in the response, potentially exposing credentials in logs or browser history.", "severity": "medium", "confidence": "firm", "file": "app.js", "line": 44, "snippet": "res.json({ username, password, token })", "cwe": "CWE-200", "tags": ["information-disclosure"]}, {"title": "Missing Rate Limiting", "description": "No rate limiting middleware is configured for authentication or API endpoints, making the application vulnerable to brute force attacks.", "severity": "low", "confidence": "tentative", "file": "app.js", "line": 1, "snippet": "const app = express()", "cwe": "CWE-307", "tags": ["rate-limiting"]}, {"title": "Wildcard Method on Health Endpoint", "description": "The /api/v1/health endpoint uses app.all() which accepts any HTTP method, unnecessarily expanding the attack surface.", "severity": "low", "confidence": "tentative", "file": "app.js", "line": 35, "snippet": "app.all('/api/v1/health')", "cwe": "CWE-749", "tags": ["configuration"]}]}
